# SBDC 77084 Service Area Note: Houston, Fort Bend, Southwest Harris

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## Why this note matters Houston-area ZIP codes can sit near county and service-area boundaries. The SBA ZIP search for 77084 returned Harris County resources, and the UH SBDC locations catalog identifies multiple Harris-area service areas. ## BOSS rule

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns legal and compliance, technology, training and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- ## Why this note matters
- Houston-area ZIP codes can sit near county and service-area boundaries. The SBA ZIP search for 77084 returned Harris County resources, and the UH SBDC locations catalog identifies multiple Harris-area service areas.
- ## BOSS rule
- Do not route based only on "Houston." Ask for the business address ZIP/county or use the official locator.
- ## Practical interpretation for 77084
- Use the SBA 77084 SBDC locator result as the first official source.
- Consider Houston Center SBDC for Central/North Harris routing.

## People and links

- Organizations: U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA), Small Business Development Center (SBDC), University of Houston
- Link: <https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Locations.asp>

## Next handoff

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) or the named qualified resource.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
